name: @forgeax/hello-fxaa
description: FXAA post-processing opt-in exemplar (feat-20260528-fxaa-post-processing / M4 / w18).

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT. hello-fxaa exercises Camera antialias=fxaa end-to-end (geometry pass -> copy swap-chain -> FXAA fullscreen pass).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room / hello-app gates that run the default zero-overhead path; FXAA opt-in cost is verified via the smoke gate (300-frame readback) rather than per-app fps sampling

bench.reason: FXAA opt-in exemplar; vitest bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math + @forgeax/engine-runtime#transparent-sort, and pixel-parity bench covers cross-backend FXAA correctness

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the M4 hello-fxaa opt-in exemplar
